yeah.

default_summary.markdown_formatted:
## Meeting Purpose

[Weekly sync between Sunbit and GrowthX teams to discuss content strategy, progress, and upcoming initiatives.](https://fathom.video/share/_hx_o7sLejUmzqqihuiscxoCBANNzoTB?tab=summary&timestamp=0.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [GrowthX is ramping up content production to 25 articles/week, focusing on B2C educational content](https://fathom.video/share/_hx_o7sLejUmzqqihuiscxoCBANNzoTB?tab=summary&timestamp=1057.0)
  - [Sunbit is developing a new brand strategy and AI-focused microsite (summit.ai)](https://fathom.video/share/_hx_o7sLejUmzqqihuiscxoCBANNzoTB?tab=summary&timestamp=1252.0)
  - [Content publishing process to be streamlined with automation and clearer workflows](https://fathom.video/share/_hx_o7sLejUmzqqihuiscxoCBANNzoTB?tab=summary&timestamp=1283.0)
  - [Organic traffic facing challenges due to AI-driven search results, but early signals for new content are positive](https://fathom.video/share/_hx_o7sLejUmzqqihuiscxoCBANNzoTB?tab=summary&timestamp=1150.0)

## Topics

### Sunbit Business Overview

  - [B2B2C company offering Buy Now, Pay Later solutions for brick-and-mortar services](https://fathom.video/share/_hx_o7sLejUmzqqihuiscxoCBANNzoTB?tab=summary&timestamp=202.0)
  - [Focus on dental, auto repair, and other service industries](https://fathom.video/share/_hx_o7sLejUmzqqihuiscxoCBANNzoTB?tab=summary&timestamp=459.0)
  - [Recently integrated with Stripe, expanding into new verticals](https://fathom.video/share/_hx_o7sLejUmzqqihuiscxoCBANNzoTB?tab=summary&timestamp=1006.0)
  - [Offers co-branded credit cards with retailers to enhance loyalty programs](https://fathom.video/share/_hx_o7sLejUmzqqihuiscxoCBANNzoTB?tab=summary&timestamp=1017.0)

### Content Strategy

  - [GrowthX creating top-of-funnel educational content (e.g., cost of dental procedures)](https://fathom.video/share/_hx_o7sLejUmzqqihuiscxoCBANNzoTB?tab=summary&timestamp=448.0)
  - [B2B content focuses on adjacencies (e.g., hiring dental assistants) to attract industry professionals](https://fathom.video/share/_hx_o7sLejUmzqqihuiscxoCBANNzoTB?tab=summary&timestamp=644.0)
  - [New AI-focused microsite (summit.ai) in development for investor-oriented content](https://fathom.video/share/_hx_o7sLejUmzqqihuiscxoCBANNzoTB?tab=summary&timestamp=663.0)

### Go-to-Market Approach

  - [Three main strategies: enterprise sales (DSOs), SMB/micro-business outreach, and consumer-facing branding](https://fathom.video/share/_hx_o7sLejUmzqqihuiscxoCBANNzoTB?tab=summary&timestamp=712.0)
  - [Strong community engagement through "Sunbeast" program with gamification elements](https://fathom.video/share/_hx_o7sLejUmzqqihuiscxoCBANNzoTB?tab=summary&timestamp=902.0)
  - [Visible branding in partner locations and employee training programs](https://fathom.video/share/_hx_o7sLejUmzqqihuiscxoCBANNzoTB?tab=summary&timestamp=861.0)

### Content Production and Publishing

  - [Ramping up to 25 articles/week, currently at 10-15](https://fathom.video/share/_hx_o7sLejUmzqqihuiscxoCBANNzoTB?tab=summary&timestamp=1394.0)
  - [Publishing process to be automated with WordPress connector (in development)](https://fathom.video/share/_hx_o7sLejUmzqqihuiscxoCBANNzoTB?tab=summary&timestamp=1293.0)
  - [Content OS being used to track article status and streamline workflow](https://fathom.video/share/_hx_o7sLejUmzqqihuiscxoCBANNzoTB?tab=summary&timestamp=1476.0)

### Organic Traffic Challenges

  - [Overall organic clicks declining despite growing impressions ("alligator chart" phenomenon)](https://fathom.video/share/_hx_o7sLejUmzqqihuiscxoCBANNzoTB?tab=summary&timestamp=1150.0)
